narrative:
Harrison Twp township has 1,414 registered voters, with 50.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.5 percentage points.
